file.content:
name: CI Ubuntu

on: workflow_call

permissions: 
  contents: read

env:
  # Customize the CMake build type here (Release, Debug, RelWithDebInfo, etc.)
  BUILD_TYPE: RELWITHDEBINFO

jobs:
  CI:
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.config.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        config:
          - {
              name: "Ubuntu 24.04 Intel GCC",
              os: ubuntu-latest,
              cc: "gcc",
              cxx: "g++",
              cflags: "-msse2"
            }
          - {
              name: "Ubuntu 24.04 Intel Clang",
              os: ubuntu-latest,
              cc: "clang",
              cxx: "clang++"
            }

    name: ${{ matrix.config.name }}
    defaults:
      run:
        shell: bash

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v5

      - name: Update apt (Ubuntu)
        env:
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND: noninteractive
        run: sudo -E apt-get update -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3

      - name: Add libheif PPA (Ubuntu)
        run: |
          sudo add-apt-repository ppa:strukturag/libde265
          sudo add-apt-repository ppa:strukturag/libheif

      - name: install dependencies
        env:
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND: noninteractive
        run: sudo -E apt-get install --fix-missing -qq -o Acquire::Retries=3 cmake clang lld gcc build-essential curl libjpeg-turbo8-dev libimagequant-dev libde265-dev libpng-dev libwebp-dev libtiff5-dev libx265-dev libheif-dev libheif-plugin-aomenc libheif-plugin-x265 libheif-plugin-aomdec libfreetype-dev libavif-dev libavifile-0.7-dev libxpm-dev libraqm-dev libexiv2-dev dh-autoreconf ninja-build nasm meson

      - name: Build and install libultrahdr
        run: |
          curl -L -o /tmp/libultrahdr-1.4.0.tar.gz https://github.com/google/libultrahdr/archive/refs/tags/v1.4.0.tar.gz
          mkdir -p /tmp/libultrahdr-src /tmp/libultrahdr-build
          tar -xzf /tmp/libultrahdr-1.4.0.tar.gz -C /tmp/libultrahdr-src --strip-components=1
          cmake -S /tmp/libultrahdr-src -B /tmp/libultrahdr-build -G "Ninja" \
            -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang \
            -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ \
            -DUHDR_BUILD_TESTS=1
          cmake --build /tmp/libultrahdr-build
          sudo cmake --install /tmp/libultrahdr-build
          sudo ldconfig
          echo "PKG_CONFIG_PATH=/usr/local/lib/pkgconfig:${PKG_CONFIG_PATH}" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Debug CC Env
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}
        run: |
          echo ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          echo ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          echo ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}

      - name: Configure CMake Clang
        if: contains(matrix.config.cc, 'clang')
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}
        run:
          cmake -G "Unix Makefiles" -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_ULTRAHDR=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1
          -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1
          -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B ${{github.workspace}}/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Configure CMake gcc
        if: contains(matrix.config.cc, 'gcc')
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}
        run:
          cmake -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_ULTRAHDR=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1
          -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1
          -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B ${{github.workspace}}/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Build
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}
        run: cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/build --config ${{env.BUILD_TYPE}} --parallel 4

      - name: Test
        working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/build
        run: |
          export TMP=${{runner.temp}}
          echo "TMP=${{github.temp}}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "LSAN_OPTIONS=suppressions=${{ github.workspace }}/suppressions/lsan.supp" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C ${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Configure CMake ASAN
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: ${{ matrix.config.cflags }}
        if: contains(matrix.config.cc, 'gcc')
        run:
          cmake -DENABLE_PNG=1 -DENABLE_FREETYPE=1 -DENABLE_JPEG=1 -DENABLE_ULTRAHDR=1 -DENABLE_WEBP=1
          -DENABLE_TIFF=1 -DENABLE_XPM=1 -DENABLE_GD_FORMATS=1 -DENABLE_HEIF=1 -DENABLE_AVIF=1
          -DBUILD_TEST=1 -B ${{github.workspace}}/buildasan -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Build ASAN
        if: contains(matrix.config.cc, 'gcc')
        env:
          CC: ${{ matrix.config.cc }}
          CXX: ${{ matrix.config.cxx }}
          CFLAGS: "-march=armv8.2-a+fp16+rcpc+dotprod+crypto -mtune=neoverse-n1"
        run: cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/buildasan --config ${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Test ASAN
        if: contains(matrix.config.cc, 'gcc')
        working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/buildasan
        run: |
          export TMP=${{runner.temp}}
          echo "TMP=${{github.temp}}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 ctest -C ${{env.BUILD_TYPE}}

      - name: Configure and Make
        working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/
        run: |
          ./bootstrap.sh
          ./configure --with-png --with-jpeg --with-heif --with-uhdr --with-xpm --with-tiff --with-webp --with-liq --enable-gd --enable-gd-formats --with-zlib
          make
          make dist

      - name: Output Log
        run: |
          if test -f "/home/runner/work/libgd/libgd/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log"; then
            cat /home/runner/work/libgd/libgd/build/Testing/Temporary/LastTest.log
          fi

      - name: Upload test images on failure
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: gd-test-images
          path: /tmp/gd_test_*.png
          retention-days: 5
